text: ♪ Through the years
♪ Through the smiles and tears
♪ We’re always there for each other
♪ We made it together

♪ We are one 
in God and in love

♪ With one heart
and one voice
♪ In times of darkness
♪ Stars shine the brightest
♪ Clouds may get in the way
♪ But there’s a light that never goes out
♪ This light lives in each one of us
♪ Let every open heart shine
♪ The warmth of a hug
♪ Can heal all brokenness
♪ This light, this beautiful light
♪ Can only come from You.
♪ Keep shining bright
♪ And bring back the colors of Christmas

♪ Thank you for the love
that stood against the test of time

♪ Bringing with it the light 
that the world needs now
♪ This Christmas time
♪ Love is what the world needs
♪ Everything is fine
♪ This Christmas time
♪ Love is what the world needs
Everything is fine
♪ In a world of chaos
♪ You are my refuge
♪ I find comfort in your arms
♪ Everything is at peace
♪ I will always come back home

♪ To your heart
Where it’s always Christmas
♪ Love, hope and happiness
♪ These are the gifts you bring
♪ The real meaning of Christmas is family
♪ Here’s to everything that awaits us
♪ Whatever comes our way
♪ We’re always there for each other
♪ We will make it together

♪ We are one 
in God and in love

♪ With one heart
and one voice

Family is Forever
